none.justification: Matches the GT categories: it identifies the local decrRefCount cases including the command-rewrite temporaries and both lcsCommand temps, and separates the INCR/float/INCREX new-value objects as ownership transfers. Minor naming/count wording issues do not affect the lifecycle classification.

ccodegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT: all local-free allocation sites are listed, and the three ownership-transfer functions are correctly separated, with INCREX's two branch allocation sites treated as transferred new values rather than leaks.

lsp.justification: Correctly separates the local decrRefCount cases from ownership-transfer sites and includes all relevant lines, including both lcsCommand temps and both INCREX new-value branches. There is some inconsistent wording about counts, but the substantive classification matches the GT.
